creator: jason_smethers@bigfoot.com
text:
/cdrom mount point in /etc/fstab is defined:
/dev/cd0a    /cdrom    cd9660  ro,noauto    0    0

When mounting a joliet filesystem cd using:
#mount /cdrom

the system reboots

How-To-Repeat: define: /dev/cd0a    /cdrom    cd9660  ro,noauto    0    0
in fstab and mount a joliet filesystem cdrom using
mount /cdrom
